issues.description: Duration is 'EndOfTurn' but card text states 'until the end of your opponent's next turn' — should be 'DuringOpponentTurn'
OnKO trigger with KO action is not present in card text. Card only describes Main play effect (Draw + PowerBoost). This entire effect block should be removed.
Target should specify 'maxCount':1 to match 'up to 1 of your Characters' in text
